text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning. First, I stretch for a few minutes, then have a glass of water and a light breakfast. By 8:00, I start work at my desk, usually responding to emails and focusing on projects until lunchtime. In the afternoon, I take a 30-minute break to go for a walk or do some simple exercises, which helps me stay energized. After work, I enjoy cooking dinner and reading a book or watching a series. I try to go to bed by 10:30. This routine keeps me consistent and feeling good every day.
